case_title: EAMON CORRY VS. FRANK S. CAJINA et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CAJINA, FRANK S.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORRY, EAMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAJINA, FRANK S. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 471 30TH STREET APT. NO. 3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94131, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORRY, EAMON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORRY, EAMON AS TO DEFENDANT CAJINA, FRANK S. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE **$43.55** FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORRY, EAMON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CAJINA, FRANK S.
